syntheticDeclaration.purpose: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE. Exercises the P3 fail-closed local-applicability gate for specimen/analyzer/method/unit mismatch against the SYNTHETIC reference-interval profile. All values are invented for schema and safety-test purposes only; this can never bind to a real site profile (see rollbackSignal).

executionBinding.engineRationale: Unit/specimen/analyzer/method mismatch is the P3 local-applicability contract's own domain; bound to the existing signed-site-profile machinery in scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs rather than inventing a parallel mechanism.

expectedBehavior.requiredSignal: Unit, specimen, analyzer/method, and reference-interval mismatch. Fail closed; request local verification; no conversion or normality assumption.
forbiddenSignals: a decision of 'applicable' despite mismatched specimen, analyzer, method, and unit codes
any automatic unit conversion applied to reconcile the mismatch instead of failing closed

expectedTrace.note: Verified by direct execution against evaluateReferenceIntervalApplicability on 2026-07-19. decision is fail_closed with four independent mismatch blockers; none is silently reconciled. Even a fully matching request against this profile could never authorize activation: evaluateActivationGate always refuses a synthetic_example profile (SYNTHETIC_PROFILE_CANNOT_ACTIVATE, AUTHORITY_NOT_EXECUTED_OWNER_HELD, SIGNATURE_NOT_EXECUTED_OWNER_HELD).

rollbackSignal: Re-verify by execution if tests/fixtures/local-profile/SYNTHETIC-reference-interval-profile.json digest changes, is superseded, or scripts/lib/local-applicability.mjs blocker logic changes. This scenario is bound to a SYNTHETIC profile only; OQ-3 (first real site profile) is owner-held and unresolved, so this fixture can never be promoted to bind a real site.
